summary: Cross-format history chain guard — break incompatible prior links, null movement deltas, filter OI consumption. No new schema required.

contractSnapshot.description: Ephemeral fingerprint computed at append/reconcile/read — not persisted in P0

fields.baseUnit: g | ml | un from catalog or inferred

contractSnapshot.pqBucket: round purchase_quantity to nearest power-of-10 bucket for tolerance (1, 10, 100, 1000)

rules.name: unit_family_mismatch
rules.description: Do not chain when operational unit families differ (weight vs countable vs volume).
signals: ingredients.base_unit family mismatch (g vs un vs ml)
rules.pseudocode: if prior.unitFamily !== next.unitFamily: return { compatible: false, reason: 'unit_family_mismatch', action: 'break_chain' }

rules.name: countable_vs_weight_contract
rules.description: Block piece/case-priced lines chaining to weight-priced catalog (pq semantics differ).
signals: invoice line has *N pack pattern vs single kg block

rules.name: extreme_operational_price_ratio
rules.description: When operational €/base-unit ratio exceeds plausible single-invoice repricing, treat as format change not movement.
signals: ratio > 25 AND (unitFamily mismatch OR form mismatch OR preservation mismatch)
rules.pseudocode: ratio = max(a,b)/min(a,b); if ratio > 100: break; if ratio > 25 && (R1||R4||R5): break

rules.name: product_form_mismatch
rules.description: Block chains across incompatible preparation/product forms using ingredient-identity.ts ontology.
signals: block vs sliced vs molho (existing INCOMPATIBLE_FORM_PAIRS)
mozzarella block token vs piece/multi-pack without shared form

rules.name: preservation_class_mismatch
rules.description: Fresh vs preserved (conserva/em conserva/pickled) must not chain even under same weight family.
signals: tokens: conserva, em conserva, pickled, escabeche vs fresco, fresh

rules.name: package_weight_order_of_magnitude
rules.description: Pack size extracted from names differs by >10x (125g piece pack vs 2kg block).
rules.pseudocode: wA = extractLineWeightGrams(prior.name); wB = extractLineWeightGrams(next.name); if both && max/min > 10: break

rules.name: beverage_volume_sanity
rules.description: Reject or break chains when beverage operational cost implies implausible €/L (volume parse errors).
rules.pseudocode: if volume line && (eurPerLiter > 50 || packMl < 50): action = block_insert; on chain compare also break
rules.note: Primarily persist-time guard; unmatched lines never reach history

rules.name: contract_key_mismatch
rules.description: Composite contract fingerprint differs — format_change baseline reset.
signals: purchase_quantity bucket change with same unit family
rules.pseudocode: if prior.contractKey !== next.contractKey: return { compatible: false, reason: 'format_change', action: 'break_chain' }

break_chain.onAppend: storedPrev = null; delta = null; delta_percent = null; still insert new_price
break_chain.onReconcile: do not propagate prevNew from incompatible prior row; restart chain at this row
break_chain.onRead: isTrustedPriceMovementRow(row) === false; exclude from movement/opportunity aggregations

block_insert.description: Skip history insert entirely when volume sanity fails (R7 only)

chainSelection.pseudocode: function selectChainCompatiblePriorPrice(rows, candidate): sort chron desc; for row in rows: snap = deriveSnapshot(row); if purchaseContractsChainCompatible(snap, candidate).compatible: return row.new_price; return null

expected.note: Line currently unmatched; guard fires at persist if matched

smallestGuardPreventingAllVLFailures.answer: R1 + R2 + R3 + R5 + R7 (unit family, countable/weight, extreme ratio, preservation class, beverage sanity). R4/R6/R8 add defense-in-depth.
smallestGuardPreventingAllVLFailures.note: Ginger Beer also needs extraction parse fix (orthogonal); R7 prevents poisoned history if matched

vlFailuresPartialP0: ginger_beer_020cl — R7 blocks bad history; full SKU disambiguation needs P1/P2
requiresPackVariantArchitecture: clean multi-supplier intel without false betterSupplierLine
ghost row prevention at match time
